overview: A functional and conventional women's medicine practice providing personalized hormone optimization across preconception, perimenopause, and post-menopause. Care is based on comprehensive lab testing and research-backed protocols addressing metabolic health, inflammation, and stress.
highlights: Research-backed Phase Protocols addressing metabolic health, inflammation, nutrition, and stress
Monthly stress response services included (massage, acupuncture, chiropractic, facial)
Specializes in fertility optimization and preconception planning
targetAudience: Women across all reproductive phases seeking functional medicine approaches to hormone health.
